svg.title: RAG pipeline flow diagram
svg.desc: Two flows: document ingestion (upload to ChromaDB) and query flow (question to answer)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types does PyMuPDF support?')
sendPrompt('How does PyMuPDF extract text from PDFs?')
sendPrompt('What is RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter and how does chunk overlap work?')
sendPrompt('What does BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 do and why is it good for RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB store and retrieve vectors?')
sendPrompt('What metadata is saved to PostgreSQL for each chunk?')

svg.text: Query flow (when user asks a question)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do we embed the question with the same model used for documents?')
sendPrompt('How does cosine similarity search work in ChromaDB?')
sendPrompt('What is a RAG prompt and how is context injected into it?')
sendPrompt('Why do we use GPT-4o-mini for answer generation?')
